commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=fc49c6db769f71c116214ea8aeafce2b73907fe0)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds local-whisper Node wrapper output-file detection and tests for empty or missing `.txt` handling while preserving stdout fallback for other wrappers.

PR surface: Source +30, Tests +187. Total +217 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: configure an inferred file-output CLI audio command, have it create an empty `.txt` transcript and print progress to stdout, and current main falls through to `stdout.trim()`. I did not run a live audio repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: A maintainer or contributor needs to decide and revise the CLI output contract, and the missing real behavior proof requires contributor-side evidence rather than an automated repair marker.

target.title: fix(media): suppress local whisper progress transcripts
target.body:
## Summary

Local Whisper wrapper progress output no longer becomes the transcript when the wrapper produced no words. OpenClaw now treats the wrapper's expected `.txt` output as authoritative for the `local-whisper/transcribe.js` CLI path, while keeping stdout fallback behavior for other CLI transcription wrappers.

The fix covers `--output-dir`, `--output`, and `-o` output-directory forms. Empty or missing local-whisper transcript files now produce no transcript, and unexpected transcript-file read errors still surface instead of being hidden as silence.

Fixes openclaw/openclaw#87384.

## Verification

- `timeout -k5s 90s pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.media-understanding.config.ts src/media-understanding/runner.cli-audio.test.ts src/media-understanding/apply.test.ts --reporter verbose --testTimeout 10000`
- `timeout -k5s 300s pnpm tsgo:core:test`
- `git diff --check origin/main..HEAD`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode commit --commit HEAD --prompt 'Review the final media-understanding fix for issue #87384. Intent: local-whisper node wrappers that write transcript files should not fall back to progress stdout when the expected transcript file is empty or missing, including -o/--output/--output-dir forms; other CLI wrappers should preserve stdout fallback; unexpected transcript read errors should surface.'`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: local Whisper CLI wrapper status text could be injected as an audio transcript when the expected transcript file was empty or missing.

Real environment tested: local OpenClaw source checkout on the PR branch `fix/local-whisper-cli-output`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: focused media-understanding Vitest coverage for `runner.cli-audio.test.ts` and `apply.test.ts`, plus `pnpm tsgo:core:test`.

Evidence after fix: regression tests now cover non-empty local-whisper file output, empty file output, missing file output, `-o` output-dir spelling, stdout fallback for non-local node wrappers, and unexpected read errors.

Observed result after fix: focused Vitest passed with 61 tests, `tsgo:core:test` exited 0, and autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.

What was not tested: live Telegram/OpenClaw gateway transcription with a real audio attachment was not run for this upstream PR.

## AI Assistance

AI-assisted implementation and review. Local review included scoped simplify/code-review passes and the repo autoreview helper; findings were manually checked against the code before applying.

---
